moon.name: moon
moon.label: Moon
moon.confidence: g/density/cohesion/friction MEASURED (Apollo + ChaSTE); Bekker MEASURED (NASA LTV).
moon.role: Artemis base camp + ISRU water ice (NASA Moon-to-Mars ADD Rev.B 2024).
moon.provenance: NASA LTV terramechanics white paper NTRS 20220010732 (k_c=1400 N/m^2, k_phi=820000 N/m^3, n=1.0, c=170 Pa); Carrier/Mitchell Lunar Sourcebook 1991; ChaSTE 2025 (rho).

mars.name: mars
mars.label: Mars
mars.confidence: g MEASURED; density/cohesion/friction MEASURED in-situ (MER/InSight); Bekker ESTIMATED (GRC-3 simulant, no native-Mars bevameter exists).
mars.role: human habitats + ISRU; MOXIE produced O2 in-situ (Hecht 2022).
mars.provenance: Oravec et al. 2020 NASA GRC (GRC-3 simulant: k_c=23.2 kN/m^2, k_phi=606.7 kN/m^3, n=1.0); Sullivan 2011 (c 0-2 kPa, phi 30-37); Spohn 2022 InSight (duricrust 5.8 kPa).

ceres.name: ceres
ceres.label: Ceres
ceres.confidence: g MEASURED (Dawn); repose 34.5 MEASURED; near-surface density ESTIMATED (crust 1200-1360, porosity 53-72%); cohesion + Bekker UNKNOWN (no in-situ data).
ceres.role: water/brine mining (Dawn brines) + Janhunen 2021 megasatellite-habitat proposal.
ceres.provenance: Park 2016 / Ermakov 2017 (g, density); Icarus 2024 (repose 34.5+/-2.8); cohesion UNKNOWN -> lunar Bekker analog used (flagged); friction = repose proxy.

bennu.name: bennu
bennu.label: Bennu (C-type asteroid)
bennu.confidence: g/density/cohesion MEASURED (OSIRIS-REx); friction ESTIMATED (boulder morphology). Bekker N/A: microgravity rubble pile, near-zero cohesion, near-fluidized surface.
bennu.g_note: varies ~3e-5 (equatorial ridge) to ~8.5e-5 m/s^2 (poles); Ryugu analog ~1.1-1.5e-4.
bennu.role: C-type asteroid water/volatile mining (Bennu first proposed target, Jin 2021).
bennu.provenance: Scheeres 2019 (g); Lauretta 2019 / Watanabe 2019 (rho 1190); Walsh 2022 (cohesion <=2 Pa, near-fluidized); Robin 2024 (phi ~33). Bekker INVALID -> use DEM/granular.

phobos.name: phobos
phobos.label: Phobos (Mars moon)
phobos.confidence: g/density MEASURED; cohesion/friction ESTIMATED (tidal-fracture models, analogs). Bekker UNKNOWN (milli-g); JAXA MMX/IDEFIX will return first in-situ data ~2027.
phobos.g_note: mean ~0.0057 m/s^2 but varies ~210% (shape) / ~450% (with Mars tides) across the body.
phobos.role: Mars-system staging waypoint + possible ISRU (NASA NTRS 20160006319; JAXA MMX).
phobos.provenance: Ernst 2023 (rho ~1850); Hurford 2016 (cohesion ~500 Pa surface model, phi ~40); Murdoch 2025 IDEFIX (phi 33.5+/-6.1 analog). Bekker UNKNOWN -> lunar analog (flagged).

earth.name: earth
earth.label: Earth
earth.confidence: reference/validation body: Wong dry-sand Bekker table (well-established).
earth.provenance: Wong, Theory of Ground Vehicles (dry sand: k_c=0.99 kN/m^(n+1), k_phi=1528.43 kN/m^(n+2), n=1.1, c=1.04 kPa, phi=28).
